meta.auction_close_label: friday 24 apr · midnight PT · when the spray-paint auction ends
meta.about: fourteen pieces by saapai p. (2015–present). pencil, colored pencil, pen, watercolor, and photograph. the portfolio unlocks after the auction — until then, each tile is a locked preview with its starting bid visible. tap any tile to offer $1 over the current bid via imessage. 10% of the total portfolio stake is reserved for art holders. specific allocation posted when this auction closes.

pieces.title: heron, in color
pieces.note: most stylised of the set — the plumage is the study, the bird is the frame. panel priced it highest.
pieces.locked_preview: a long-necked heron built out of every color at once · plumage tuned like a stained-glass window · panel priced it highest in the drop.

pieces.title: bald eagle, watching
pieces.note: feather texture is the study, not the bird.
pieces.locked_preview: a bald eagle sitting in profile · every feather picked out one by one · the bird is the excuse, the texture is the study.

pieces.title: tarantula, orange on black
pieces.note: colored pencil at high contrast; the orange is saturated without going flat.
pieces.locked_preview: black body · bright orange knee-patches · bristles pulled out of the page in a thousand short strokes.

pieces.title: jack sparrow, looking down
pieces.note: likeness study after the pirates stills. the shading in the bandana beads is the tell.
pieces.locked_preview: depp-as-jack-sparrow in shadow · bandana + beads + dreadlocks · the earliest piece in the drop, 2015.

pieces.title: eagle, up close
pieces.note: close-up portrait — the pupil catch and the radial feathers carry it.
pieces.locked_preview: pulled in tight · two eyes + one beak + radial feathers going to the edge of the frame.

pieces.title: robber fly, feeding
pieces.note: insect study; the wing-membrane gradient holds the piece together.
pieces.locked_preview: a robber fly caught mid-meal · wing membrane graded like a tobacco leaf · all leg hairs accounted for.

pieces.title: profile, man-bun
pieces.note: profile study; beard tonal range is where the hand shows.
pieces.locked_preview: a bearded profile with a man-bun · eyes closed · the beard is where the pencil got the most use.

pieces.title: conch, tangled
pieces.note: zentangle — each ridge a different pattern. patient rather than flashy.
pieces.locked_preview: a conch shell · every ridge a different pattern · pen on paper, filled in by hand, no shortcut.

pieces.title: small face, large eyes
pieces.note: softer pressure, warmer register. reference was a photograph.
pieces.locked_preview: a small face, large eyes · soft pressure throughout · the warmer register of the drop.

pieces.title: scorpion, raised tail
pieces.note: anatomical — leg-bristles are the detail. earliest graphite work in the drop.
pieces.locked_preview: a scorpion mid-strike · tail raised, claws back · anatomical and bristled.

pieces.title: coming soon · 04.25.2026
pieces.note: rgb-split + shutter-blur teaser poster. the one-frame register the hunt runs on.
pieces.locked_preview: a motion-blurred chromatic poster reading 'coming soon · 04.25.2026' · the register every other piece is sitting on.

pieces.title: figure, on the move
pieces.note: kitxhe_ / @orbstudio.co. shutter speed too slow, on purpose. the blur is the point.
pieces.locked_preview: a figure photographed with the shutter too slow · plaid jacket, backpack, the body doubled across the frame.

pieces.title: a face, unfinished
pieces.note: confident line, partial color. the kind of imperfection the art portfolio is looking for.
pieces.locked_preview: a face drawn confidently and left unfinished · crayon outline, watercolor accents, plum lips + ochre hair.

pieces.title: kraft folio, back cover
pieces.note: the portfolio the drop travels in. the frame, not the content.
pieces.locked_preview: the kraft folio the fourteen pieces travel in · photographed from the back · a slow piece about containers.
